steps.title: Spot the defining clue
steps.content: The phrase leaves his signature is the key. The noun “signature” — something created and marked — tells us that leaves must mean to write or create something visible.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Writes directly captures what it means to leave a signature — to write or create it visibly. Switches, allows, and promotes describe unrelated actions that don't fit marking something on artwork. That matches choice A — A is correct.
